item.title: ProvingGrounds Butch Writeup
item.author: Xavier
item.description: Butch 这是第26台，Windows系统，难度中等，名称 Butch If you know your ASP.NET, you will be fine. Otherwise, this machine will teach you some of that. 192.168.225.63 PortScan ┌──(xavier㉿kali)-[~/Desk

item.author: Xavier
item.description: Vault 这是第23台，Windows系统，难度Hard，名称 Vault 192.168.202.172 PortScan ┌──(xavier㉿kali)-[~/Desktop/OSCP] └─$ sudo nmap -n -r

item.author: Xavier

item.title: ProvingGrouds ClamAV WriteUp
item.author: Xavier
item.description: ClamAV 第8台，Linux系统，难度Easy，名称 ClamAV 端口扫描 ┌──(xavier㉿kali)-[~] └─$ sudo nmap -n -r --min-rate=3500 -sSV 192.168.193.42 -T4 [sudo] xavier 的密码： Starting Nmap 7.94 ( https://nmap.org )
